summary: Phase C Dark Launch Infrastructure testing completed. All 22 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend tests passed - Dark Launch tab renders correctly with activation status, engine cards, simulated engagement score, and drill-down functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: Phase C feature flag correctly returns enable_phase_c:false when thresholds (1/4) and viral events (0/1000) are not met
All 4 engines (streaks, leaderboard, rewards, achievements) compute correctly and store data in separate collections
Admin endpoints properly protected - unauthenticated returns 401, normal user returns 403
No Phase C data leaks to public endpoints - /api/phase-c/status only returns activation status, not user data
Dark Launch UI correctly shows 'DARK MODE — Accumulating Silently' status with condition indicators
Drill-down panel opens correctly when clicking aggregate cards
seed_data_creation: None - engines compute from existing viral_referrals and jobs data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase C Dark Launch is fully functional. All backend engines work correctly (streaks, leaderboard, rewards, achievements). Feature flag correctly gates activation on 4/5 thresholds AND 1000+ viral events. Admin monitor and drill-down endpoints work. Frontend Dark Launch tab in Admin Dashboard shows all elements correctly. Currently showing 0 data because no viral referral data exists to compute rankings from.

backend: GET /api/phase-c/status - returns enable_phase_c:false with correct threshold/volume data ✓
POST /api/phase-c/engine/run-all - computes all 4 engines (streaks, leaderboard, rewards, achievements) ✓
POST /api/phase-c/engine/compute-leaderboard - stores rankings and daily snapshots ✓
POST /api/phase-c/engine/compute-rewards - silently creates pending rewards with earned_at ✓
GET /api/phase-c/admin/monitor - returns aggregate stats (leaderboard, rewards, streaks, achievements, simulated engagement) ✓
Security: Unauthenticated access to admin endpoints returns 401/403 ✓
Security: Normal user access to admin endpoints returns 403 ✓
Security: No hidden Phase C data leaks in public /api/streaks/my or /api/phase-c/status ✓
frontend: Activation status card shows DARK MODE with condition indicators (data-testid='dark-launch-activation') ✓
'Run All Engines' button triggers engine computation (data-testid='run-engines-btn') ✓
Aggregate cards display: Leaderboard, Pending Rewards, Active Streaks, Achievements ✓
Simulated Engagement Score section shows eligible users counts ✓
Drill-down panel opens when clicking aggregate cards (data-testid='drill-down-panel') ✓
